faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Clifton typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on factors like nest size, location accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. Ground nests are generally less expensive to remove than those in high or hard-to-reach areas like second-story eaves or attics. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Clifton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most wasp removal requests in Clifton. The actual removal process typically takes 30-60 minutes depending on nest location and size. Our technicians come fully equipped to handle wasp emergencies safely and efficiently, minimizing disruption to your property.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clifton residents most commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests or nest in wall voids, paper wasps create umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and overhangs, and bald-faced hornets build large gray nests in trees or on structures. Our team is experienced in safely removing all wasp species found in the area.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use targeted treatments applied directly to nests, minimize chemical exposure, and provide clear instructions about any necessary precautions. Our technicians wear protective gear and follow strict safety protocols to ensure wasps are eliminated without putting anyone at risk.
